description: Find a specific contact by external ID, phone number, or email. IMPORTANT: Only use this tool when the user explicitly asks to FIND or LOOK UP a contact. DO NOT use this tool: (1) Before adding contacts - use contacts_add directly. (2) Before tagging contacts - use phone numbers directly with tags_assign_contacts. (3) For listing contacts - use contacts_get_summary instead. Use this tool directly only when a single call to this tool is sufficient to complete the user's request; for any sequence of two or more tool calls, use the `batch_action` tool instead.

partnerClientCode.description: Optional partner client code to call APIs on behalf of a specific partner office/sub-client. Only use when explicitly requested by the user.
